name: Greenhawk Resources Inc.
description: Greenhawk Resources Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration and development company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties. The company's primary asset is the Storuman Mono-Mineralic Quartz Project located in Sweden, which is being developed to supply high-purity quartz for various industrial applications. Greenhawk Resources is committed to identifying and developing high-quality mineral assets to create long-term value for its shareholders.
